title: PASS invoice creates clean accounting packet
steps: Open an audited PASS invoice intake linked to a frozen pricing snapshot.
Review AMP5 Finance Handoff summary and accounting packet JSON.
Mark ready for finance, then queue accounting packet.
expected: Finance handoff status moves from DRAFT to READY_FOR_FINANCE, then ACCOUNTING_READY.
Accounting packet cites intake id, pricing snapshot id, rollup, finance decision, and line evidence.
No ERP posting or invoice mutation occurs automatically.

title: WARN invoice drafts carrier dispute note
steps: Open an audited WARN invoice with AMBER lines.
Edit the generated vendor dispute draft with settlement context.
expected: Dispute draft lists attention lines with invoice amount, expected amount, variance, and explanation.
Assistant action queue receives a copy_text action for the invoice intake.

title: FAIL invoice is overridden with durable finance evidence
steps: Open an audited FAIL invoice with RED lines.
Record finance override on the existing review step.
Use AMP5 Finance Handoff to save the packet and queue accounting review only after human review.
expected: Finance handoff packet includes frozen pricing snapshot total and non-GREEN attention lines.
Audit events record the packet update and queued action.
Accounting packet remains copy/export-ready and does not silently approve payment.
